title: siRNA-mediated Knockdown – RAW 264.7
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"25l2o","text":"This protocol details steps taken to perform siRNA-mediated knockdowns in RAW 264.7 cells.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"1spr2","text":"DMEM (Thermo Fisher Scientific, 11965-092)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a2mln","text":"FBS (Thermo Fisher Scientific, 16140-071)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dqv8u","text":"Penicillin/Streptomycin (Thermo Fisher Scientific, 15140122)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a3plj","text":"CellStripper (Corning, 356230)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5h0p7","text":"Lipofectamine RNAiMAX (Invitrogen, 2448190)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b9kf7","text":"Opti-Mem (Thermo Fisher Scientific, 31985062)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Plate 2.5 x 10^5 RAW 264.7 cells per well in a 6-well dish.
Transfect cells using Lipofectamine RNAiMAX and gene specific siRNAs.

RNAiMAX protocol In Tube 1 combine 112.5 µL Opti-MEM and 4.5 µL Lipofectamine RNAiMAX then incubate for 00:05:00 . In Tube 2 combine 132 µL Opti-MEM and 2 µL siRNA (final concentration of 100 nM) then incubate for 00:05:00 . Combine Tube 1 and Tube 2. Incubate for 00:20:00 . Add drop-wise to 1 well containing 1.75 mL of media.
Change the media and perform subsequent experiments.
creator: Amanda Bentley-DeSousa
